description: Synthetic, deterministic inputs for pilot-v1. The runner materializes each section in a fresh worktree before either arm runs.

files.src/router.ts: export function resolveLane(risk: string) { return risk === 'high' ? 'direct' : 'worker'; }
files.src/server.ts:
import { resolveLane } from './router.js';
export const requestLane = (risk: string) => resolveLane(risk);

tail_lines: 边界证据：统一验收状态必须可回溯。

facts.SR02_MATCH: The only Chinese match is on generated line 1201
facts.SR02_TAIL: The match occurs in the final two lines of the generated file

files.logs/test.log:
[setup] database ready
[test] parser suite started
AssertionError: expected 3 records, received 2
    at parser.test.ts:41:7
[cleanup] failed because suite aborted

facts.AD01_CAUSE: The parser assertion is the first causal failure

files.src/adapter.ts:
import { load } from './source.js';
export const adapt = () => load().slice(0, 8);
files.src/presenter.ts:
import { adapt } from './adapter.js';
export const present = () => adapt();

files.spec.md: parsePort must accept integers from 1 through 65535 and reject all other inputs.

facts.RV02_SEMANTIC: The patch routes high risk work to worker instead of direct

facts.BF01_ORACLE: The supplied assertion is the focused regression oracle

files.src/runner.ts:
export const command = "Get-ChildItem | Select-String needle";
export const shell = 'cmd.exe';
files.tests/runner.test.ts: The command must execute through PowerShell end-to-end on Windows and must not be piped through cmd.exe.

facts.BF02_SHELL: A PowerShell pipeline is incorrectly assigned to cmd.exe
facts.BF02_FIX: The shell and command must remain PowerShell-shaped end-to-end

files.contract.md: Add contract_version and outcome at the top level. Removing those two fields must reproduce legacy.json exactly.

facts.SF01_ADDITIVE: Only contract_version and outcome may be added
facts.SF01_COMPAT: Removing the two additions must deep-equal legacy.json

files.logs/full.log:
suite start

FAIL cleanup-b: downstream abort
summary: 2 passed, 2 failed

facts.TL01_FIRST: parser is the first causal failure
facts.TL01_SUMMARY: The final summary is 2 passed and 2 failed
facts.TL01_FULL: The answer must retain a reference to logs/full.log
